examples: The building which houses the Picturedrome opened in 1886 and it currently shows films on their first release.
Bognor Regis Town Council, which owns the Picturedrome, said it would be put out of business by a new multiplex cinema.
Regeneration plans for Bognor Regis in Sussex threaten the survival of its Picturedrome cinema, according to members of Bognor Regis Town Council.
